source_context: Web design and SEO agency monetizing through B2B client acquisition — builds custom-coded websites and provides SEO services for businesses in Kenya. Brand purpose: help Kenyan businesses establish and grow their digital presence to compete online, attract customers, and generate revenue through their website.
central_entity_context: The website as the primary digital asset of a Kenyan business — the entity that exists in every topic from creation to optimization to growth.
central_search_intent: Professional website design and SEO services in Kenya that help businesses rank on Google, attract customers, and grow online

build_technology.approach: Custom-built websites — NOT WordPress. No CMS themes or page builders.
build_technology.note: All topical map content about website building must reflect custom development advantages: performance, security, speed, no plugin bloat, clean code — rather than WordPress/Elementor/WooCommerce workflows.

target_niches: Industrial and machinery businesses (GossTech type) — highest priority: money, terrible websites, near-zero agency competition

market_context.geography: Kenya — primary markets: Nairobi, Mombasa, Kisumu, Nakuru; upcountry towns for hospitality
market_context.target_clients: Kenyan SMEs across 6 defined niches — industrial, medical, legal, real estate, hospitality, education
local_factors: Nairobi CBD vs Westlands vs Industrial Area business hubs

topical_border_definition: Everything from website conception, design, custom development, and SEO optimization for Kenyan businesses — including Kenya-specific digital factors (M-Pesa, mobile, local search). Outer edge includes broader digital marketing, branding, and Kenyan business growth context. Excluded: WordPress tutorials, page builder content, social media management as standalone, general business consulting, offline marketing, accounting, HR.
main_attribute_rationale: Both core services (web design = creates digital presence, SEO = grows digital presence) serve the same unified outcome. This is the main attribute connecting source context to central entity for a web + SEO agency.

business_plan_notes.launch_strategy: Build 3 free demo sites per niche before approaching clients. Lead with demo link in WhatsApp/walk-in pitch. Close first client before running any paid marketing.
business_plan_notes.revenue_model: Website builds are one-time; retainer (maintenance) and SEO packages are recurring MRR. Target: Ksh 60,000 MRR by Month 3.
business_plan_notes.month_6_projection: Ksh 182,000/month from website builds + retainers + SEO packages combined.
